channel.title: Magic: The Gathering – Neue Karten & Spoiler
channel.description: Automatisch generierter RSS Feed für neu gespoilerte und veröffentlichte Magic: The Gathering Karten via Scryfall.

item.title: Captain Kirk, Boldly Going [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Captain Kirk, Boldly Going

Manakosten: {1}{G}{W}{U}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek Commander

Vigilance
Spacecraft creatures you control get +3/+3.
Whenever Captain Kirk enters or attacks, search your library and/or graveyard for a basic land card or a card named Starship Enterprise, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Preordain [MagicFest 2026]
item.description:
Preordain

Manakosten: {U}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: MagicFest 2026

Scry 2, then draw a card. (To scry 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Life from the Loam [Eternal Weekend]
item.description:
Life from the Loam

Manakosten: {1}{G}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Eternal Weekend

Return up to three target land cards from your graveyard to your hand.
Dredge 3 (If you would draw a card, you may mill three cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Treasure Cruise [Eternal Weekend]
item.description:
Treasure Cruise

Manakosten: {7}{U}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Eternal Weekend

Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.)
Draw three cards.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Stingcaster Mage [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Stingcaster Mage

Manakosten: {1}{R}

Typ: Creature — Human Wizard

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

Haste
When this creature enters, target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Chandra, Torch of Defiance [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Chandra, Torch of Defiance

Manakosten: {2}{R}{R}

Typ: Legendary Planeswalker — Chandra

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

+1: Exile the top card of your library. You may cast that card. If you don't, Chandra deals 2 damage to each opponent.
+1: Add {R}{R}.
−3: Chandra deals 4 damage to target creature.
−7: You get an emblem with "Whenever you cast a spell, this emblem deals 5 damage to any target."

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Chandra, Chill of Compliance [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Chandra, Chill of Compliance

Manakosten: {1}{U}{U}

Typ: Legendary Planeswalker — Chandra

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

+1: Surveil 1. If you put a noncreature, nonland card into your graveyard this way, put that card into your hand.
+1: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast a noncreature spell.
−X: Tap target artifact or creature. Put X stun counters on it.
−6: You get an emblem with "Whenever you cast a spell, draw a card."

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Bloodline Recollector // Ancestral Craving [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Bloodline Recollector // Ancestral Craving

Manakosten: {1}{B} // {B}

Typ: Creature — Vampire Warlock // Instant

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

At the beginning of each end step, if three or more creatures died this turn, this creature becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
//
Target player draws three cards and loses 3 life.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Voice of Victory [Planeswalker Championship Promos]
item.description:
Voice of Victory

Manakosten: {1}{W}

Typ: Creature — Human Bard

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Planeswalker Championship Promos

Mobilize 2 (Whenever this creature attacks, create two tapped and attacking 1/1 red Warrior creature tokens. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step.)
Your opponents can't cast spells during your turn.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Strategic Betrayal [Planeswalker Championship Promos]
item.description:
Strategic Betrayal

Manakosten: {1}{B}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Planeswalker Championship Promos

Target opponent exiles a creature they control and their graveyard.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Kozilek's Command [Secret Lair Promo]
item.description:
Kozilek's Command

Manakosten: {X}{C}{C}

Typ: Kindred Instant — Eldrazi

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Promo

Choose two —
• Target player creates X 0/1 colorless Eldrazi Spawn creature tokens with "Sacrifice this token: Add {C}."
• Target player scries X, then draws a card.
• Exile target creature with mana value X or less.
• Exile up to X target cards from graveyards.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Pinnacle Starcage [Secret Lair Promo]
item.description:
Pinnacle Starcage

Manakosten: {1}{W}{W}

Typ: Artifact

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Promo

When this artifact enters, exile all artifacts and creatures with mana value 2 or less until this artifact leaves the battlefield.
{6}{W}{W}: Put each card exiled with this artifact into its owner's graveyard, then create a 2/2 colorless Robot artifact creature token for each card put into a graveyard this way. Sacrifice this artifact.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Sunpearl Kirin [Secret Lair Promo]
item.description:
Sunpearl Kirin

Manakosten: {1}{W}

Typ: Creature — Kirin

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Promo

Flash
Flying
When this creature enters, return up to one other target nonland permanent you control to its owner's hand. If it was a token, draw a card.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Shuri, Wakandan Inventor [Media and Collaboration Promos]
item.description:
Shuri, Wakandan Inventor

Manakosten: {1}{U}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Artificer Hero

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Media and Collaboration Promos

Artifact spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.
{1}, {T}: Target artifact you control becomes a copy of a second target artifact you control until end of turn, except it isn't legendary. Activate only as a sorcery.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Arcane Signet [The Hobbit Commander]
item.description:
Arcane Signet

Manakosten: {2}

Typ: Artifact

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit Commander

{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: The One Ring [The Hobbit Commander]
item.description:
The One Ring

Manakosten: {4}

Typ: Legendary Artifact

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit Commander

Indestructible
When The One Ring enters, if you cast it, you gain protection from everything until your next turn.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life for each burden counter on The One Ring.
{T}: Put a burden counter on The One Ring, then draw a card for each burden counter on The One Ring.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Tom Bombadil [The Hobbit Commander]
item.description:
Tom Bombadil

Manakosten: {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — God Bard

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit Commander

As long as there are four or more lore counters among Sagas you control, Tom Bombadil has hexproof and indestructible.
Whenever the final chapter ability of a Saga you control resolves, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a Saga card. Put that card onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. This ability triggers only once each turn.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Sauron, the Dark Lord [The Hobbit Commander]
item.description:
Sauron, the Dark Lord

Manakosten: {3}{U}{B}{R}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Avatar Horror

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit Commander

Ward—Sacrifice a legendary artifact or legendary creature.
Whenever an opponent casts a spell, amass Orcs 1.
Whenever an Army you control deals combat damage to a player, the Ring tempts you.
Whenever the Ring tempts you, you may discard your hand. If you do, draw four cards.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Forest [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Forest

Typ: Basic Land — Forest

Seltenheit: Common

Set: The Hobbit

({T}: Add {G}.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Mountain [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Mountain

Typ: Basic Land — Mountain

Seltenheit: Common

Set: The Hobbit

({T}: Add {R}.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Swamp [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Swamp

Typ: Basic Land — Swamp

Seltenheit: Common

Set: The Hobbit

({T}: Add {B}.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Island [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Island

Typ: Basic Land — Island

Seltenheit: Common

Set: The Hobbit

({T}: Add {U}.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Plains [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Plains

Typ: Basic Land — Plains

Seltenheit: Common

Set: The Hobbit

({T}: Add {W}.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: My Precious // Allure of Power [The Hobbit]
item.description:
My Precious // Allure of Power

Manakosten: {3} // {1}{B}

Typ: Legendary Artifact — Equipment // Instant — Adventure

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: The Hobbit

Equipped creature has hexproof and can't be blocked.
Equip—{2}, Pay 2 life.
//
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature.
Draw two cards.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: The Arkenstone // Seek the Heart [The Hobbit]
item.description:
The Arkenstone // Seek the Heart

Manakosten: {5} // {2}{W}

Typ: Legendary Artifact // Sorcery — Adventure

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit

Creatures you control get +1/+1.
At the beginning of your end step, draw a card.
//
Search your library for a legendary creature card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. (Then exile this card. You may cast the artifact later from exile.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Tom, Bert, and William [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Tom, Bert, and William

Manakosten: {3}{B}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Troll

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: The Hobbit

{1}, Sacrifice another creature: Draw cards equal to the sacrificed creature's power, then discard a card.
When Tom, Bert, and William die, if they were a creature, return them to the battlefield. They're an artifact. (They're no longer a creature.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Wood Elves [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Wood Elves

Manakosten: {2}{G}

Typ: Creature — Elf Scout

Seltenheit: Common

Set: The Hobbit

When this creature enters, search your library for a Forest card, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Thorin, Mountain-king [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Thorin, Mountain-king

Manakosten: {3}{R}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Dwarf Noble

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit

Trample
When Thorin enters, attach any number of target Equipment you control to target creature you control. When one or more Equipment become attached to that creature this way, that creature deals damage equal to its power to up to one target creature.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Smaug the Magnificent [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Smaug the Magnificent

Manakosten: {2}{R}{R}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Dragon

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit

Flying, haste
Whenever Smaug attacks, he deals damage equal to the number of Treasures you control to any target.
At the beginning of your upkeep, create a Treasure token.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Riddles in the Dark [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Riddles in the Dark

Manakosten: {2}{U}

Typ: Instant

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: The Hobbit

Look at the top four cards of your library and separate them into a face-down pile and a face-up pile. An opponent chooses one of the piles. Put that pile into your hand and the other into your graveyard.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Bilbo, Thief in the Night [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Bilbo, Thief in the Night

Manakosten: {1}{U}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Halfling Rogue

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit

Spells you cast from anywhere other than your hand cost {1} less to cast.
Whenever Bilbo attacks, you may cast an artifact, instant, or sorcery spell from your graveyard. If an instant or sorcery spell cast this way would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Bilbo, Luckwearer // Burglar's Plot [The Hobbit]
item.description:
Bilbo, Luckwearer // Burglar's Plot

Manakosten: {1}{U} // {4}{U}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Halfling Rogue // Sorcery — Adventure

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: The Hobbit

Bilbo can't be blocked.
Whenever Bilbo deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card.
//
Exchange control of two target nonland permanents that share a card type. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: An Unexpected Party // At the Door [The Hobbit]
item.description:
An Unexpected Party // At the Door

Manakosten: {2}{W}{W} // {X}{2}{W}

Typ: Enchantment // Sorcery — Adventure

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: The Hobbit

As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type.
Creatures you control of the chosen type get +2/+2.
//
Create X 2/2 red Dwarf creature tokens. (Then exile this card. You may cast the enchantment later from exile.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Path of Ancestry [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Path of Ancestry

Typ: Land

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. When that mana is spent to cast a creature spell that shares a creature type with your commander, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Sol Ring [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Sol Ring

Manakosten: {1}

Typ: Artifact

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

{T}: Add {C}{C}.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Coat of Arms [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Coat of Arms

Manakosten: {5}

Typ: Artifact

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Each creature gets +1/+1 for each other creature on the battlefield that shares at least one creature type with it. (For example, if two Goblin Warriors and a Goblin Shaman are on the battlefield, each gets +2/+2.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Lathril, Blade of the Elves [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Lathril, Blade of the Elves

Manakosten: {2}{B}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Elf Noble

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
Whenever Lathril deals combat damage to a player, create that many 1/1 green Elf Warrior creature tokens.
{T}, Tap ten untapped Elves you control: Each opponent loses 10 life and you gain 10 life.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Finale of Devastation [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Finale of Devastation

Manakosten: {X}{G}{G}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Search your library and/or graveyard for a creature card with mana value X or less and put it onto the battlefield. If you search your library this way, shuffle. If X is 10 or more, creatures you control get +X/+X and gain haste until end of turn.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Cultivate [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Cultivate

Manakosten: {2}{G}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Dark Ritual [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Dark Ritual

Manakosten: {B}

Typ: Instant

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Add {B}{B}{B}.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Fabricate [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Fabricate

Manakosten: {2}{U}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Search your library for an artifact card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Baxter Building [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Baxter Building

Typ: Land

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

{T}: Add {C}.
{4}, {T}: Add four mana in any combination of colors.
{4}, {T}: Draw a card. Activate only if you control a creature with toughness 4 or greater.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Tippy-Toe, Terrific Partner [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Tippy-Toe, Terrific Partner

Manakosten: {3}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Squirrel Hero

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

If you would create one or more tokens, instead create those tokens plus an additional Food token.
At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, draw a card.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Hex Magic [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Hex Magic

Manakosten: {2}{R}

Typ: Sorcery — Arcane

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Exile all the cards from your hand, then draw that many cards. Until the end of your next turn, you may play cards exiled this way.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Undead Hand Ninja [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Undead Hand Ninja

Manakosten: {1}{B}

Typ: Creature — Zombie Ninja Villain

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Deathtouch
Whenever one or more creature cards leave your graveyard, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Hammerhead, Maggia Boss [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Hammerhead, Maggia Boss

Manakosten: {1}{B}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Rogue Villain

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Sacrifice another creature or artifact: Put a +1/+1 counter on Hammerhead.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Hellcat, Undying Vigilante [Wizards Play Network 2026]
item.description:
Hellcat, Undying Vigilante

Manakosten: {G}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Hero

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Wizards Play Network 2026

Haste
When Hellcat dies, return her to the battlefield under her owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on her. She loses all abilities and gains haste.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Quicksilver, Brash Blur [Pro Tour Promos]
item.description:
Quicksilver, Brash Blur

Manakosten: {R}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Mutant Hero

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Pro Tour Promos

If Quicksilver, Brash Blur is in your opening hand, you may begin the game with him on the battlefield.
Haste
Power-up — {4}{R}: Put a +1/+1 counter and a double strike counter on Quicksilver. (Activate each power-up ability only once. Reduce the cost by his mana cost if he entered this turn.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Prismatic Ending [MagicFest 2026]
item.description:
Prismatic Ending

Manakosten: {X}{W}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: MagicFest 2026

Converge — Exile target nonland permanent if its mana value is less than or equal to the number of colors of mana spent to cast this spell.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Titania, Protector of Argoth [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Titania, Protector of Argoth

Manakosten: {3}{G}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Elemental

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Secret Lair Drop

When Titania enters, return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
Whenever a land you control is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, create a 5/3 green Elemental creature token.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Tireless Provisioner [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Tireless Provisioner

Manakosten: {2}{G}

Typ: Creature — Elf Scout

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a Food token or a Treasure token. (Food is an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life." Treasure is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Six [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Six

Manakosten: {2}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Treefolk

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Reach
Whenever Six attacks, mill three cards. You may put a land card from among them into your hand.
During your turn, nonland permanent cards in your graveyard have retrace. (You may cast permanent cards from your graveyard by discarding a land card in addition to paying their other costs.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Ramunap Excavator [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Ramunap Excavator

Manakosten: {2}{G}

Typ: Creature — Snake Cleric

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Secret Lair Drop

You may play lands from your graveyard.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Nissa, Resurgent Animist [Secret Lair Drop]
item.description:
Nissa, Resurgent Animist

Manakosten: {2}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Elf Scout

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Secret Lair Drop

Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, add one mana of any color. Then if this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an Elf or Elemental card. Put that card into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Atraxa, Praetors' Voice [MagicFest 2026]
item.description:
Atraxa, Praetors' Voice

Manakosten: {G}{W}{U}{B}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Phyrexian Angel Horror

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: MagicFest 2026

Flying, vigilance, deathtouch, lifelink
At the beginning of your end step, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Utopia Sprawl [MagicFest 2026]
item.description:
Utopia Sprawl

Manakosten: {G}

Typ: Enchantment — Aura

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: MagicFest 2026

Enchant Forest
As this Aura enters, choose a color.
Whenever enchanted Forest is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional one mana of the chosen color.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Llanowar Elves [MagicFest 2026]
item.description:
Llanowar Elves

Manakosten: {G}

Typ: Creature — Elf Druid

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: MagicFest 2026

{T}: Add {G}.

Auf Scryfall ansehen
